title: SNAIL GARDEN 4 Bundles of 20 Heads Artificial Daisies Flowers,2 Colors Silk Gerbera Daisies Flowers Realistic Artificial Flower for Home Office Party Wedding Centerpiece Decorations (yellow,orange)
features: 【20 Heads Silk flowers 】Instead of single stem daisies,SNAIL GARDEN daisy are bunches , which are more convenient for arranging , or you can cut them down to make your own DIY. You can get 4 bunches of 5 daisies each, with a total of 20 daisies.The diameter of the flower head is 10cm, the total length of the flower branch is 24cm.

【2 Spring Colours & Lifelike Material】The artificial spring flowers adopt premium silk material,each flower has multi-layer petals,real touch and natural-looking.And the bright range yellow color making it more lifelike and vibrant just like real flowers,giving you the perfect flower bunch for celebrating every important moment in your life.

【Clean Easily & No Smell】The plastic flowers never wilt and can be recyclable, always bright and colorful.No need to water and fertilize,you will always have a bunch of blooming flower,just wiping dust when dirty.And it has no smell,no need to worry pollen allergy, artificial flower is friendly for who may allergic to flower pollen.

【Adjustable for Free DIY or Flower Arrangement】-The stem of silk spring flowers is steel wire, which can be bented into various angles according to need. You can work with these faux wild flowers to create many lovely bouquets for DIY floral arrangements decor that fits perfectly into your personal decor,such as home decoration,office decoration wedding bouquet and events decoration.

【 Decor Anywhere/Anytime 】-The silk wild flowers can be used in multiple scenes,perfect for home decoration,office decoration wedding bouquet and events decoration.Especially for wedding,the mini chrysanthemum is ideal for decorating tables,backgrounds,etc.And fake flowers never die , always decor your life without time limits.
description: Material: Silk,Plastic Quantity: 4 bundles 20 heads Size: The diameter of the flower head is 10cm/4in, and the total length of the flower branches is 24cm/9.5in Color: orange, yellow
